description_long: This object is a rectangular Marshall stereo sound system with a classic, vintage-inspired design. The front face features a black mesh grille with a gold 'Marshall' logo and a gold accent strip along the bottom, giving it a premium and recognizable appearance. The top panel houses three gold rotary knobs and a gold toggle switch, all set into a recessed area, likely for volume, bass, and treble control. The sides and back are covered in a textured, dark material that resembles leather or vinyl, providing both durability and a tactile feel. The object sits on small, rounded feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall build suggests a solid, robust construction suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A rectangular Marshall stereo sound system with a black mesh grille, gold logo, and top-mounted gold control knobs. The body is covered in textured dark material, giving it a classic, premium look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black mesh grille, gold 'Marshall' logo, and gold accent strip.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, textured dark surface and the top-mounted gold control knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, textured back and the tops of the gold control knobs.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, textured surface and partial view of the top control knobs.
attribute_brand_logo: Gold 'Marshall' script logo centered on the front grille.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Front grille features a tightly woven black mesh pattern with a gold accent strip at the bottom.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three gold rotary knobs and one gold toggle switch arranged in a row on a recessed top panel.
